---
title: "Getting started"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting started}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r}
library(basetable)
```

`basetable` provides a base-style front end for tabular work with a
`data.table` backend. The core design goals are explicit semantics, compact
naming, and equal support for nested calls and native `|>` pipelines.

```{r}
subset(mtcars, cyl == 6, select = c("mpg", "hp", "wt"))
```

```{r}
mtcars |>
  pick(c("mpg", "hp", "wt", "cyl")) |>
  aggregate(by = "cyl", value = c("mpg", "hp"), fun = mean)
```
